nasb.text: But Abishai the son of Zeruiah said, “Should not Shimei be put to death for this, because he cursed the Lord’s anointed?”

esv.text: Abishai the son of Zeruiah answered, “Shall not Shimei be put to death for this, because he cursed the Lord’s anointed?”

cnv.text: 洗魯雅的兒子亞比篩回答說：“示每咒罵了耶和華的受膏者，豈不該因此把他處死嗎？”

ccb.text: 洗鲁雅的儿子亚比筛说：“示每曾经咒骂耶和华所膏立的君王，难道不应该处死他吗？”
